author: Josu
name: BigramHash4096 + MLP992 + LR0.08 + Slide64 (Over Cap)
blurb: 8xH100 run with MLP_HIDDEN=992, MATRIX_LR=0.08, BigramHash(4096,64), sliding-window eval at stride 64, and fp16 embedding passthrough. Strong score, but total int8+zlib artifact exceeds the 16,000,000-byte cap, so it is stored in the non-record track.
